title: Celebrity gif. Amy Schumer holding a ginormous glass of wine that's bigger than her head. She closes her eyes and holds the glass in two hands as she begins to chug the wine. She drinks sloppily, letting the wine run down her face and shirt, as she drinks in rapture.
Snl Drinking GIF by Saturday Night Live
Happy Hour Drinking GIF by BBC

TV gif. Matthew McConaughey as Rustin Cohle leans over a table and looks around with a serious expression on his face. He says, “‘Cause it's Thursday and it's past noon. Thursday is one of my days off. On my off days, I start drinking at noon.”

TV gif. Jennifer Coolidge as Tanya McQuoid in "The White Lotus" is wearing a gold-speckled black chiffon veil over her head on a swaying boat. She awkwardly cracks a smile as she raises a glass of champagne and says "Wee-hee!"
animal house drinking GIF by TV4
Wine Drinking GIF by DJ Mosaken
Celebrity gif. Will Ferrell bounces in a vibrating chair as he tries to sip from a wine glass that spills down his front.
Happy Hour Drinking GIF by Busch Beer
Happy Hour Drinking GIF by UFC
Over It Drinking GIF by Saturday Night Live
Video gif. A baby sips out of a straw and closes her eyes as she puckers her lips. She leans back from the cup with a frown as one eye twitches and she drops her head back behind her.

TV gif. Jack McBrayer as Kenneth Parcell from 30 Rock lifts a plastic water bottle to his lips, his hand shaking violently. The water spills everywhere, all over his clothes, as he attempts to drink. He's obviously nervous and scared--of what, we don't know.
Drunk That 70S Show GIF by Peacock

TV gif. Zach Galifianakis on The Tim and Eric Awesome Show, Great Job! walks on the beach with his hair absurdly tall. He carries three enormous champagne glasses which are full, and says, "C'mon guys! Vodka beach party!"
TV gif. Peter Dinklage as Tyrion in Game of Thrones raises a chalice as he gazes up disinterestedly.

TV gif. A drunken Jaime Pressly as Joy in My Name is Earl tries to grab her straw with her mouth, missing it entirely.

Sponsored gif. Two hands clink two champagne coupes together. Text reads, “Cheers!” In the upper right corner is the logo for the show The Traitors.

Wildlife gif. A catfish perches on the outside ledge of a boat and sips from a gold beer can held by a person inside.
The Office gif. Craig Robinson as Darryl Philbin sways around, looking like he's about to puke. Rainbow text in all caps says, "I've been drinking."
